sections.about_subtitle: Learn more about my journey and what drives me as a developer
sections.about_hook: Frontend Engineer who ships fast without breaking things. Built dashboards serving 1M+ users at Tencent/MiHoYo scale.
sections.about_current_detail: Full-stack SaaS with Next.js + Supabase. Exploring AI-assisted development, cloud architecture, and data-driven product thinking.
sections.about_diff_1: 0-to-1 startups + enterprise experience. Knows when to move fast and when to architect for growth.
sections.about_diff_2: Specializing in performance (35% faster loads), architecture (GraphQL layers), and scale (500K-row tables at 60fps).
sections.experience_subtitle: Building products at scale. From Tencent's millions to startup MVPs.
